title: Huawei S210-8T Gbit Cloud Switch
description: Huawei S210-8T is a reliable managed cloud L2 switch with a switching capacity of 16Gbps and (8) Gbit ports . It supports management via a local web interface as well as cloud management ( eKit SNC / eKit mobile app ). The maximum power consumption is 8.9W (8) Gbit ports Passive cooling - silent operation, suitable for office environments Huawei Online Upgrade Platform (HOUP) - automatic one-click updates Protection against DoS attacks and other security features Automatic loop prevention, VLAN, QoS and uplink port link aggregation Device Power adapter and cable Rubber feet
